title: SGT University, Queen Mary University of London and UK India Legal Partnership launch ADR leadership course in London: Register now
description: The Faculty of Law, SGT University, in collaboration with Queen Mary University of London and the UK India Legal Partnership (UKILP), has announced an Executive Leadership Course on Leadership and International Dispute Resolution (ADR), scheduled from 18 June 2026 to 23 June 2026 in London.This international programme brings together distinguished legal academicians and practitioners, including Nigel Spencer, David Smith, and Joshua Kelly, to deliver advanced insights into leadership, negot
